headline: Own ABNB Stock? Here Is How To Collect 14% A Year On It
summary: Here is a way to get paid a meaningful income now on your Airbnb shares, cash you keep no matter what, in exchange for agreeing to sell at a price above today's if the stock keeps climbing.

raw.headline: Own ABNB Stock? Here Is How To Collect 14% A Year On It
raw.summary: Here is a way to get paid a meaningful income now on your Airbnb shares, cash you keep no matter what, in exchange for agreeing to sell at a price above today's if the stock keeps climbing.

headline: High-end camping and a capital raise: AutoCamp is banking on summer travel to fuel growth
summary: AutoCamp offers Airstream suites, polished cabins, fire pits, design-forward amenities and access to iconic outdoor destinations.

raw.headline: High-end camping and a capital raise: AutoCamp is banking on summer travel to fuel growth
raw.summary: AutoCamp offers Airstream suites, polished cabins, fire pits, design-forward amenities and access to iconic outdoor destinations.

headline: AutoCamp bets big on America's outdoor travel boom
summary: As Americans flock to the great outdoors this travel season, luxury camping company AutoCamp is cashing in. The glamping operator is seeing strong demand and a growth in bookings, and now it's offering customers a chance to buy in and take a stake in the company.

raw.headline: AutoCamp bets big on America's outdoor travel boom
